description_long: This is a robust, rectangular rolling toolbox with a deep red, marbled metal exterior and a matte black top surface. The front features three drawers of varying heights, each equipped with a sturdy horizontal handle, and the bottom drawer is the largest. The toolbox sits on four black caster wheels, allowing for easy mobility. The sides are plain except for the handles, while the back is unadorned and solid. A small brand logo and some white labeling are visible on the lower right of the front panel. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for heavy-duty urban or garage use.
description: A red, metal rolling toolbox with three front drawers, black handles, and caster wheels, featuring a matte black top and visible brand logo.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain red metal panel and a black handle near the top.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a solid, unadorned red metal panel with no handles or drawers visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, with a plain red panel and a black handle.
description_view_3: Front view showing three drawers with black handles, a brand logo, and white labeling on the lower right.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed, horizontal bar handles made of metal with a rectangular cross-section, attached to the front of each drawer and the sides for maneuvering; no ergonomic padding or folding features visible.
attribute_latch_mechanism: No explicit latch or locking mechanism is visible; drawers appear to be pull-to-open with no visible keyholes or combination locks.
attribute_brand_logo: A small circular logo with a flame symbol and the word 'Caution' is visible on the lower right of the front panel.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Three front-facing drawers of varying heights, all horizontally aligned; no external bins or trays visible; compartments appear fixed.
attribute_external_labeling: White text labels on the upper left of each drawer front, and a 'Caution' logo with a flame symbol on the lower right drawer.
